meta.title: Walk and Tour Copenhagen | Walking Tours & Local Experiences
meta.description: Copenhagen walking tours and local experiences led by passionate guides. Free tours, castle visits, and day trips.

hero.heading: Copenhagen Walking Tours & Unique Local Experiences
hero.subheading: Discover Copenhagen through stories, history and unforgettable local experiences led by passionate guides.

tours.heading: Choose the Perfect Tour for Your Visit
tours.intro1: Whether you are interested in history, architecture, food, royal palaces or day trips, we have the perfect experience waiting for you.
tours.intro2: Explore Copenhagen your way - with small groups, expert guides and flexible options designed for every traveler.

copenhagenFreeTour.title: Copenhagen Free Tour: Changing of the Guard & City Highlights

whyChoose.heading: Why Travelers Choose Walk & Tour
whyChoose.description: At Walk and Tour, we believe the best way to truly experience Copenhagen is on foot and at a local pace.

bullets.tipsBased: Tips Based Tours - Pay what you want based on your experience.
bullets.localKnowledge: Unique local knowledge and hidden gems in every tour.
bullets.smallGroups: Small groups for a more personal and comfortable experience.
bullets.friendlyGuides: Friendly, professional guides with a passion for Copenhagen.
bullets.greatForEveryone: Great for solo travelers, couples, families and small groups.

privateTours.heading: Private Tours & Corporate Experiences
privateTours.description1: Looking for a personalized experience in Copenhagen?
privateTours.description2: We offer private walking tours and corporate experiences tailored to your schedule and interests. Whether you want a historical deep dive, a food-focused adventure or a team-building activity, we create the perfect itinerary just for you.
privateTours.ctaLabel: Contact us to design your private Copenhagen experience

contact.heading: Let's Plan Your Copenhagen Experience
contact.subheading: Contact us today and we will answer as soon as possible!

footer.blurb: Walk and Tour Copenhagen offers expertise, personalized tours, great value, and exceptional service for an unforgettable travel experiences.

newsletter.title: Subscribe
newsletter.description: Join our newsletter for new tours, travel tips, and updates.
newsletter.consent: I agree to receive Walk and Tour newsletter.
